name: rule-engine closed-loop step doctor-explain shows the resolution chain for the rule in doctor output
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  no-eval: error\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --step doctor-explain --rule-id no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'doctor_explain_invoked=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
